metadata.review_rule: remapped local cofactor evidence can prioritize review but cannot make a label countable without review import, evidence-gap clearance, and label-factory gate acceptance

rows.review_policy: alternate-structure remaps and ligand hits are review-only; do not count labels until review import and factory gates clear unresolved evidence gaps
